description: WASM Plugin capability pack manifest binding for Pack Runtime route gates, frontend sync, sandbox lifecycle, permission plans, evidence export, and lightweight SDK import discovery.
principles: Expose WASM plugin registry, load/unload lifecycle, dry-run sandbox execution, and JSON evidence export as a high-risk optional Pack Runtime capability instead of a hard-coded main-shell feature.
Keep WASM method/path gates, frontend menu/route sync, and SDK import metadata in the pack manifest.
Let external projects import yunque-client/wasm-plugin only when the WASM Plugin pack is installed and enabled.
